title: Named Set
description: Schema for a named set object. Named sets define reusable set definitions at the model level that can be referenced from behavioral logic (requires, guarantees, etc.). A named set must have a name starting with underscore (e.g., '_ValidStatuses', '_AllowedRoles') and a description. It may optionally include a formal specification and type specification.

name.description: The name of the named set. Must start with an underscore (e.g., '_ValidStatuses', '_AllowedRoles'). This is required and must be non-empty.

description.description: A human-readable description of the named set.

notation.description: Required. The formal notation system. Currently the only supported value is 'tla_plus'. Must always be present. If validation fails: ensure this is exactly 'tla_plus'.

specification.description: Optional formal specification defining the set contents in the given notation (e.g., '{"pending", "active", "complete"}').

type_spec.description: Optional type specification for the set (e.g., 'SUBSET STRING', 'SUBSET Int'). Declares the TLA+ type of the set.
